title: I'm Chevy Chase and You're Not
original_title: I'm Chevy Chase and You're Not
overview: From his Saturday Night Live beginnings to a string of classic comedies, Chevy Chase has always had huge comedic range. He is also a complex and contradictory human being. Featuring revealing interviews with those closest to him, this documentary digs into the talent, flaws, and humanity that shaped an icon.

trailers.title: Chevy Chase became a chess master after his heart failure
